description: Focused research sprint: lead researcher coordinates web intel, repo scouting, and synthesis

missions.Lead-Researcher: Coordinate the research team. Define questions, assign angles, synthesize findings into actionable recommendations.
missions.Web-Intel: Search the web for current information. Use WebSearch and WebFetch. Find articles, docs, blog posts. Report raw findings.
missions.Repo-Scout: Explore GitHub repos relevant to the topic. Read READMEs, check stars/activity, extract patterns and code examples.
missions.Synthesizer: Take raw findings from Web-Intel and Repo-Scout. Cross-reference, identify patterns, write the final research report.

panes.name: Lead-Researcher
panes.focus: Define research questions, coordinate team, synthesize final output

panes.name: Web-Intel
panes.focus: Web search, article extraction, current information gathering

panes.name: Repo-Scout
panes.focus: GitHub exploration, repo analysis, code pattern extraction

panes.name: Synthesizer
panes.focus: Cross-reference findings, identify patterns, write research report
